title.en: And right now, this fragment is from a high-lev...

content.en:
High-grade Perfect Treasures are very rare and precious, and their value is far from being comparable to Medium-Perfect Treasures.

Even for a force like the Daoless Tower, the value of a high-grade perfect treasure was incomparably great, enough for a force like the Daoless Tower to fight for it.

Ye Tian's current best perfect treasure is also a medium perfect treasure, and he has not yet obtained a high-level perfect treasure.

And right now, this fragment is from a high-level perfect treasure.

"Mo Chen's escape before relied on it!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He didn't have time to study the fragment now, so he put it away and studied it slowly later.

Right now, the most important thing is to deal with the nameless kun.

To be able to allow Mo Chen to risk his life twice to enter the eighth layer of the Nine Rivers Void, it must be because the eighth layer has unimaginable opportunities and benefits, so he entered there again.

Such benefits, he naturally wanted.

Swish!

Ye Tian's copy body also entered the Nine Rivers Void, and soon came to the seventh layer of the Nine Rivers Void.

Here, Ye Tian found the Lord of Corrosion who was healing.

......

"Ye Tian, you're not dead?"

The Lord of Corrosion was shocked.

Immediately, he was a little scared.

His strength didn't need to be afraid of Ye Tian, but now that he was in a state of heavy damage, he had to be afraid.

"Lord of Corrosion, you dare to pit me!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

The Lord of Corrosion trembled and said, "Ye Tian, this is none of my business, Mochen wants to trap you, you have to find him!"

"Mochen, I've already killed you!" Ye Tian said lightly.

When the Lord of Corrosion heard this, he was even more frightened.

"Ye Tian, killing me is not good for you, and although I am seriously injured, I really have to work hard, and you may not end up benefiting. If you let me go, I can share the information of the eighth layer of the Nine Rivers Void to you. "

The Lord of Corrosion hurriedly said.

"Information from the eighth layer of the Nine Rivers Void?"

Ye Tian is really interested in this.

"Tell me why you entered the eighth layer of the Nine Rivers Void?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Lord of Corrosion quickly revealed an important piece of information: "There is a Ten Thousand Thunder True Fruit on the eighth layer of the Nine Rivers Void, this treasure can help Mo Chen and I step from a primary perfect master to a medium perfect master, if we can step into a medium perfect master, we don't need to be afraid of that nameless kun!"

"Ten Thousand Thunder True Fruit!"

It was the first time Ye Tian had heard of this kind of treasure, but he also knew that for the Perfect Controller, most of the Perfect Controllers were almost always at the primary level of the Perfect Controller, and it was difficult for them to continue to break through.

On top of the primary perfect controller, there are medium perfect controllers, advanced perfect controllers, and super perfect controllers, but if you want to become a super perfect controller, you must break through with a half-step perfect controller in the Extreme Realm, and after the breakthrough, condense the super perfect ancestor, and only then can you hope to become a super perfect controller in the future.

Of course, that's just hope, after all, there are too many powerhouses who have condensed the super-perfect ancestor, but in the end, they haven't broken through to the super-perfect controller.

"What else is there besides the Ten Thousand Thunder True Fruit?"

Ye Tian asked.

"I don't know. The Lord of Corrosion shook his head, "We didn't have a chance to look for it slowly in the eighth layer, and I still learned through a special way that the eighth layer has ten thousand thunder true fruits." As for the rest, I don't really know. "

Ye Tian could roughly tell that the Lord of Corrosion should not be lying.

"Ye Tian, I've already said it, how about this matter?"

The Lord of Corrosion said nervously.

"Not good!"

Ye Tian sneered.

Immediately, Ye Tian made a move.

"Damn it, you untrustworthy guy!"

The Lord of Corruption said angrily.

"Hehe, it's you who don't keep your word first, you said you cooperated, but you tricked me and asked me to keep my promise?"

Ye Tian sneered.

Bang!!!!

The battle was almost crushing, and the Lord of Corrosion was not Ye Tian's opponent at all, although his state was much better than Mo Chen's, but he was soon completely severely injured and was on the verge of death.

Eleventh hour.

The Lord of Corrosion wanted to drag Ye Tian to die together.

"Ye Tian, the seventh layer of the void is my home field, if you want to kill me, then die with me!"

The Lord of Corrosion mobilized the power of the seventh layer of the void and directly dragged Ye Tian to annihilate together.

Rumble!!!

Endless space-time shattered, all energy exploded, and this void was annihilated hundreds of millions of times.

And Ye Tian was in the midst of hundreds of millions of void annihilation, and he used all kinds of means to avoid damage.

After a long time, the seventh layer of the void was almost in ruins, and everything was destroyed.

However, the energy of the other voids of the Nine Rivers Void continued to pour in, and it would not be long before this place would slowly recover.

At this time.

The Lord of Corrosion was completely dead, but Ye Tian was not dead, only injured.

But soon, Ye Tian completely recovered.

"The Lord of Corrosion's move is indeed good, if it is another half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm, maybe it will really be hit hard. It's a pity that I have too many perfect-level ancestral endowments, and the perfect-level ancestral endowments that can avoid damage are not good, this move can't kill me, at most it will bring me a little trouble!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Once the Lord of Corruption is solved, the next step is the Nameless Kun.

He was certainly no match for the Nameless Kun, after all, his strength was comparable to that of an ordinary Primary-Perfect Master, and that Nameless Kun was comparable to a Medium Perfection Master.

Even if dozens of primary-level perfect masters joined forces, they would not be able to compete with this nameless kun.

But.

Ye Tian didn't need to beat him, he just needed to drag the nameless kun.

"It's not hard to hold back the Nameless Kun! The Nameless Kun will be Nameless Mist, and so will I. Everyone cast a nameless mist, and they were involved with each other. Sacrificing a replica body and a clone of the will is worth it if you can gain enough benefits!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, he was ready to do it.

......

The eighth layer of the Nine Rivers Void.

Ye Tian rushed out of the sea of Kun from the body of the nameless kun.

At this time, the nameless Kun found out that Ye Tian was not dead, and he was immediately a little curious.

However, the IQ of the Nameless Kun is not high, and it can grow to this extent, completely because the bloodline and life level are too strong.

"Nameless Mist!"

Ye Tian cast this perfect level ancestral endowment.

And the same is true of the Nameless Kun, which releases the Nameless Mist.

Suddenly, the nameless Kun and Ye Tian fought.

Ye Tian's copy body and the will clone of the two great Extreme Creation Realm combat forces are not the opponents of the five Kun, and they can only remain immortal.

At the same time, Ye Tian's second copy body shuttled into the eighth layer of the Nine Rivers Void to find the Ten Thousand Thunder True Fruit and other treasures.

"I hope there will be a big harvest this time!"

Ye Tian said expectantly.
